proof_sketch: Threads launched: threads_count = min(out_features, 1024). out_idx = threadIdx.x ∈ [0, threads_count-1]. Since threads_count ≤ out_features, out_idx ≤ out_features-1 < out_features < out_features+1. Thus both original (out_idx ≥ out_features) and mutant (out_idx ≥ out_features+1) are always false for all launched threads. The guard never triggers.
